aboutDescription: I hold a double major in Electronics and Telecommunications. I also hold two Master's degrees: one in Industrial Engineering from Argentina and another in Business Intelligence & Analytics from Germany. I work as a Senior Solution Consultant in AI and Analytics at OpenText, a world leader in Content Management Software Solutions. I have extensive experience leading projects and have held senior positions in other major tech companies. On many occasions, I coordinate multiple cross-functional teams to meet project deadlines. Leadership is part of my character, but I also enjoy working independently to solve problems. Day by day, I strengthen my skills in Analytics and Data Science as a PhD candidate at my hometown University, UNC. Persistently and relentlessly, I am pursuing my dream to someday become a doctor. My hobbies include retro computing, long-distance cycling, and peaceful walks in the forest. I now live in the south of Germany, enjoying the challenges of living in a different culture and learning a new language.
